release_notes: Orphan position detection: compares active state files against the broker's live positions and alerts on any divergence (dashboard banner + notification), without ever auto-closing a position. See `docs/security.md`. Data Management page (`/data`): download/restore a full backup of app data (auto-snapshots before restore), plus one-click simulation and temp-file cleanup. See `docs/data-management.md`. (#82) `performance.db`, `run_history.db`, `sim_sessions.db`, and the app event log now live under `DATA_ROOT` instead of the source directory, so they're included in backups and land in `%APPDATA%\ThetaPrime` in the packaged installer like the rest of the app's data.
